title: pomaderris andromedifolia subsp. andromedifolia
intro: Pomaderris andromedifolia subsp. andromedifolia, also known as the scrub pomaderris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pomaderris andromedifolia subsp. andromedifolia include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into infusions or teas, or used in topical applications for their medicinal properties.
